calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:05am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Respondent Billy Stathopoulos appears in Pro Per; Appellant Reiko Lowman appears in Pro Per. Also present is Demitrus Stathopoulos and Arthur C. Lowman. Parties and witnesses are sworn. Parties present their cases, respectively, in the narrative. Judge Myles questions the parties.
9:30am
The matter is submitted. No new evidence is admitted or retained.
